atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports a history of DCIS, stage zero, ER/PR positive, invasive ductal carcinoma of the right breast, and a lumpectomy with five benign lymph nodes removed.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports age-related back and knee pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports being allergic to penicillin.

atomic_propositions.speaker: unknown
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient takes coq10, vitamin D, vitamin C, fish oil, and elderberry fruit.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's exam reveals skin thickening at the medial inferior aspect of the right breast, likely due to radiation.

atomic_propositions.speaker: unknown
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's ecog performance status is zero.

atomic_propositions.speaker: test_result
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Mammogram in January 2021 was negative for recurrence and malignancy.

atomic_propositions.speaker: unknown
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The mass was 4.2 x 3 x 2.3 centimeters.
